offer: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: Manual reconciliation of monthly rent can lead to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try monthly rent report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
